label: asset_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with shadcn Dialog primitive
Local useState for loto/cal toggles → useForm (react-hook-form) with zodResolver; checkbox fields map to z.boolean()
Mock MNT_ASSETS/production_lines data → Drizzle query joining assets + production_lines tables in Server Component or RSC loader
L3 extension fields section → tenant JSONB column rendered dynamically from schema registry; use shadcn Collapsible to hide by default
Add Server Action with RBAC guard (isManager check) before upsert; emit asset.created / asset.updated outbox event
Conditional calibration interval field (disabled={!cal}) → Controller field with watch('requiresCalibration') and dynamic disabled prop
Hardcoded equipment types list → reference table query from settings_equipment_types
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.asset.form.*

label: wr_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; use sheet variant for mobile shop-floor touch targets
Character counter on textarea (desc.length / 1000) → controlled Input with useWatch + FormDescription; enforce minLength=10 in zod schema
Severity grid buttons (wr-sev-btn) → shadcn ToggleGroup single-select mapped to z.enum(['critical','high','medium','low'])
Auto-fill from downtime event prop → Server Component pre-fills defaultValues from downtime_events query when downtimeEventId param present
QR Scan button → triggers camera permission + zxing scanner; wired as P2 per BL-SCN-02 pattern
File multi-upload → shadcn Input type=file + server-side S3 upload via presigned URL Server Action
Add Server Action with RBAC guard; emit work_request.created outbox event on success
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.wr.create.*

label: wr_triage_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=wide → Dialog with max-w-3xl; read-only summary-block section → shadcn Card with read-only dl/dd key-value grid
Three-path decision toggle (approve/reject/duplicate) → shadcn RadioGroup or ToggleGroup; each value conditionally shows additional fields via watch()
Conditional approve fields (priority, type, technician, start) → useWatch('decision') === 'approve' guard wrapping FormField group
V-MNT-02 requester !== approver constraint → enforce in Server Action; display alert banner client-side as advisory only
Duplicate-of mWO picker → shadcn Command/Combobox with debounced search against mwos API route
Add Server Action that transitions WR status (requested → approved/rejected/duplicate) and creates mWO record when approved; emit wr.triaged outbox event
MNT_TECHNICIANS mock → Drizzle query on technicians table filtered by on_shift=true
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.wr.triage.*

label: mwo_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; assetId prop pre-fills asset Select via defaultValues
mWO type radio grid (5 types) → shadcn RadioGroup with icon badges for each type variant
Priority radio grid → RadioGroup with PriorityBadge visual; maps to z.enum(['critical','high','medium','low'])
Conditional sanitation allergen checkbox → useWatch('type') === 'sanitation' guard; allergen changeover flag persisted on mwo record
PM schedule linker Select → Combobox with search against pm_schedules filtered by asset; optional field
Add Server Action creating mwo record with initial state=open; emit mwo.created outbox event; RBAC guard on isManager
MNT_PM_SCHEDULES / MNT_TECHNICIANS mocks → parallel Drizzle queries in Server Component
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.mwo.create.*

label: task_checkoff_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; step prop drives dynamic title and conditional field rendering based on step.type
step.type === 'measure' branch → Input + unit Select; actual value stored and auto-compared to expected in Server Action returning pass/fail
step.type === 'photo' branch → Input type=file with capture=environment; upload via S3 presigned URL Server Action
Parts used sub-section → inline table with Drizzle query for planned parts on this step; quantity Input updates consumed_qty
step.type === 'signoff' + PIN input → shadcn Input type=password; Server Action verifies PIN against user credential hash
Time logged fields → duration Number Input + note Text; persisted as labor_entry row linked to mwo + step
Add Server Action marking checklist step done; emit mwo.step_completed outbox event; enforce RBAC (assigned tech only)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.mwo.tasks.*

label: mwo_complete_signoff_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=wide → Dialog max-w-3xl; preconditions block → shadcn Card with dynamic check icons driven by Server Component query
allOk derived state → computed server-side from mwo checklist completion + LOTO cleared status; passed as prop to client component
Three-button footer (Cancel / Save draft / Confirm complete) → shadcn Button variants; Save draft calls partial-save Server Action
Sign-off strip rows (technician auto-applied, supervisor counter-sign, safety officer) → multi-role signoff table; each row calls request_signoff Server Action
Completion notes textarea required (V-MNT-04) → zod .min(1) + refine; persisted as mwo.completion_notes column
Follow-up mWO checkbox → if checked, Server Action creates new mwo record linked via parent_mwo_id
Asset status after work Select → updates assets.status column on mwo completion
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.mwo.complete.*

label: pm_schedule_edit_wizard
translation_notes: Stepper primitive → shadcn Steps (or custom stepper built on ol/li) tracking completed Set; step keys: asset/freq/assign/review
Step 1 asset selection → shadcn Select for asset + RadioGroup for schedule type + allergen Checkbox with conditional Alert
Step 2 frequency inputs → three-option RadioGroup for interval basis (calendar/usage-hours/cycles) + numeric Inputs for interval/warning/lead-time
Step 3 assignment → Select for technician + Combobox for template from task_templates table; auto-generate Checkbox
Step 4 review → read-only Summary Card + generated occurrences table computed server-side from interval; useQuery or Server Component
Save & activate vs Save buttons → Server Action with active=true/false flag; emit pm_schedule.created outbox event
MNT_TEMPLATES mock → Drizzle query on task_templates table
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.pm.wizard.*

label: pm_occurrence_skip_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; summary-block read-only section → shadcn dl key-value pairs
Reason Select (Planned downtime / Asset offline / ...) → shadcn Select mapped to z.enum(skipReasonEnum)
Additional notes ReasonInput with minLength=10 → shadcn Textarea with zod .min(10) validation
Next due date override date Input → shadcn DatePicker; if blank, computed by Server Action as last_done + interval_days
Compliance metric warning Alert → informational shadcn Alert; manager notification emitted as pm_schedule.skip_threshold_exceeded event if count > config threshold
Add Server Action updating pm_occurrence status=skipped + logging skip_reason; RBAC guard isManager
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.pm.skip.*

label: calibration_reading_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=wide → Dialog max-w-3xl; dynamic test points array (add/remove) → useFieldArray from react-hook-form
Per-point inSpec auto-compute → derive pass/fail in onChange handler: Math.abs(measured - reference) / reference * 100 <= tolerance
Overall result auto-compute (PASS/FAIL) → derived from all point.inSpec values; override checkbox sets manual=FAIL in form state
FAIL result → Alert + Server Action emits calibration.fail outbox event triggering Quality hold candidate creation in 09-QUALITY
Certificate PDF upload → Input type=file; Server Action uploads to S3 + computes SHA-256 + stores hash in calibration_records.cert_sha256
Next due date readOnly field → computed server-side as calibrated_at + instrument.interval_days; displayed via Server Component
MNT_SKILL_MATRIX filter for Calibration skill → Drizzle query joining technicians + tech_skills where skill='Calibration'
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.calibration.record.*

label: calibration_cert_upload_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; cert-card display → shadcn Card with pending SHA-256 placeholder
PDF file input → shadcn Input type=file accept=application/pdf; client-side 10MB size check before upload
Server Action: upload to S3, compute SHA-256 hash via crypto.subtle, store in calibration_certificates table with cert_date + issuing_authority
Authenticity confirmation Checkbox → required; z.literal(true) in zod schema to block submit until checked
21 CFR Part 11 note: SHA-256 hash stored immutably; retention = 7 years from cert_date (BRCGS Issue 10)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.calibration.certUpload.*

label: spare_reorder_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; summary-block pre-filled from spare part master → read-only shadcn Card section loaded via Server Component
Reorder qty Input → z.number().positive(); UoM shown as readOnly pre-filled from spare.unit
Supplier and lead-time fields pre-filled from spare_parts.supplier_id join → readOnly display; link to supplier detail
Server Action creates purchase_request record with status=pending; BL-MAINT-07 note: P2 integration with 04-Planning PO module pending
P2 note Alert → informational shadcn Alert; track via feature flag purchasing.po_integration.enabled
Add RBAC guard; emit spare.reorder_requested outbox event; notify warehouse manager via notification service
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.spares.reorder.*
known_bugs: BL-MAINT-07: P2 PO integration not wired; creates internal notification only in P1

label: technician_skill_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=wide → Dialog max-w-2xl; skill level RadioGroup → shadcn RadioGroup with z.enum(['basic','advanced','specialist'])
Certifications repeating rows table → useFieldArray; each row has text inputs for name/issuer + date pickers for issue/expiry + file upload for scan
File upload per row (⇪ button) → S3 presigned upload per certification scan; store URL in tech_certifications.scan_url
Add row button → fieldArray.append({ name:'', issuer:'', issue:'', expiry:'', scan:null })
Cert expiry tracking note → server-side cron job alerts 30 days before expiry via notification_events; display-only in prototype
GDPR note (Technician Detail) → personal data fields must have data_category annotation in Drizzle schema for GDPR compliance
Add Server Action upserting technician_skills + tech_certifications; RBAC guard isManager only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.technicians.skills.*
known_bugs: BL-MAINT-05: Skills Matrix PDF export with cert scans is button stub only

label: loto_apply_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal dismissible=false → Dialog with no close on outside click; two-person policy enforced server-side
Energy source isolation checklist (nrg-step rows) → useFieldArray of steps with done boolean; toggle updates local Set via useState pattern → useForm array
Second verifier pending note → server-side WebSocket or polling; second person must confirm from own session (BL-MAINT-04: remote confirmation flow pending)
Tags/locks repeating rows → useFieldArray with location/tag-id/applied-by fields; add/remove via append/remove
Zero-energy Checkbox with PIN confirmation → shadcn Checkbox + PIN Input; Server Action verifies user credential before persisting
Server Action creates loto_procedure record with status=active + energy_sources JSONB array; emit loto.applied outbox event
V-MNT safety constraint: two-person verification required for critical assets; enforce in Server Action not just client
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.loto.apply.*
known_bugs: BL-MAINT-02: LOTO photo evidence currently Recommended; awaiting safety sign-off to gate as Required
BL-MAINT-04: Two-person remote confirmation flow not prototyped — assumes separate sessions

label: loto_clear_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal dismissible=false size=wide → Dialog max-w-2xl; pre-clear checklist → useFieldArray of boolean checks
Two-person sign-off strip → two separate signoff rows; each sign button calls request_signoff Server Action with role (technician/safety_officer)
canConfirm derived state → allChecked && signed.t1 && signed.t2 → computed server-side; client receives pre-condition status as prop
mWO in-progress warning Alert → sourced from loto_procedure.linked_mwo join with mwos.status; shown only when status !== completed/paused
Photo evidence file input → optional in P1 per config loto.photoEvidence setting; S3 upload via Server Action
Server Action updates loto_procedure status=cleared + records cleared_by + cleared_at; RBAC guard two-person validation
V-MNT-09 constraint: both signers must be distinct users; enforce in Server Action
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.loto.clear.*
known_bugs: BL-MAINT-02: Photo evidence gate configurable but currently Recommended only

label: delete_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal dismissible=false size=sm → AlertDialog (shadcn AlertDialog, not Dialog) for destructive confirmation pattern
Type-to-confirm Input → controlled state; submit disabled until typed.trim().toUpperCase() === code.toUpperCase(); zod .refine() to enforce
Generic entity/code props → single reusable component accepting entity: string + code: string; renders appropriate copy
Server Action performs soft-delete (active=false, deactivated_at=now()); linked records preserved for audit per business rule
RBAC guard isAdmin only for delete; emit entity.deactivated outbox event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.delete.*

label: criticality_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; current criticality shown as read-only CritBadge → shadcn Badge with color variant
New criticality Select → z.enum(['critical','high','medium','low']); paired with effective_date DatePicker
ReasonInput with minLength=10 → shadcn Textarea with zod .min(10) validation message
Server Action appends row to maintenance_history audit log table; updates assets.criticality + assets.criticality_override_at
RBAC guard isManager; emit asset.criticality_changed outbox event with old/new values for downstream consumers
Audit log note → display-only; production component should link to maintenance_history filtered view
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.asset.criticalityOverride.*

label: downtime_linkage_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=wide → Dialog; read-only downtime events table → shadcn Table with radio-select row highlighting
Selected row state → single-select via RadioGroup with table row onClick; Button disabled until selected !== null
Downtime events sourced from 08-PRODUCTION downtime_events table → cross-module Drizzle query filtered by asset_id + status=open
V-MNT-22 source update note → Server Action updates mwos.source_type=auto_downtime + mwos.source_note when linking
Add Server Action linking mwo to downtime_event via mwo_downtime_links table; emit mwo.downtime_linked outbox event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.mwo.downtimeLink.*

label: spare_adjust_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; current qty shown as readOnly Input; new qty as controlled Input with zod z.number().int().nonnegative()
Reason Select (Damage/Cycle count/Spillage/Expired/Other) → shadcn Select mapped to z.enum(adjustReasonEnum)
Detailed reason Textarea → zod .min(10); manager approval gate: if abs(new-old)/old > 0.10 emit spare.adjustment_requires_approval event
Server Action creates spare_transaction row (type=adjust, delta=new-old) + updates spare_parts.qty_on_hand; RBAC guard
>10% delta approval gate → check in Server Action; return approval_required status to client; show pending state until manager confirms
Audit-logged note → immutable spare_transactions table; display in Spare Part Detail consumption history tab
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.spares.adjust.*

label: maintenance_dashboard
translation_notes: MNT_KPIS mock data → parallel Drizzle queries in Server Component: mwos count grouped by status, pm_schedules overdue count, calibration overdue count
8-KPI grid → shadcn Card grid (kpi-grid-8 CSS) → Tailwind grid-cols-4 on md, grid-cols-8 on xl; each KPI is a clickable Card navigating to relevant list page
Today's mWO table → Drizzle query mwos WHERE scheduled_start::date = today ORDER BY priority; rendered as shadcn Table in Server Component
PM compliance strip (overdue/due counts + nearest-due table) → aggregate queries on pm_schedules; DueCell color logic via Tailwind conditional classes
Critical alerts strip → alerts_notifications table query; client-side dismiss stores dismissed codes in user session or localStorage
Active LOTO panel → loto_procedures WHERE status=active; real-time updates via SSE or 30s polling
Onboarding card (isManager only) → RBAC gate in Server Component; step completion computed from DB state; dismissal stored in user_preferences
MTBF sparkline → time-series from oee_shift_metrics (15-OEE cross-module read); inline SVG bars → Recharts BarChart in client component
Cross-module bridge section → read-only derived data from production_wos (delayed) + quality_ccps (blocked); no write actions
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.dashboard.*

label: asset_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_ASSETS mock + MNT_ASSET_HIER mock → Drizzle query joining assets + asset_hierarchy (ltree) with recursive CTE for tree structure
Asset hierarchy sidebar tree (280px column) → shadcn Collapsible or custom TreeView using radix-ui Accordion; level-0/1/2 indent via Tailwind pl-x classes
Hierarchy node selected line filter → URL search param ?line=LINE-01; Server Component re-renders filtered table
Filter bar (type/criticality/status/loto/cal checkboxes) → URL search params with nuqs or native URLSearchParams; filters applied in Drizzle WHERE clause
Asset table with bulk checkbox → shadcn Table + Checkbox in header for select-all; useRowSelection hook for bulk actions
Export CSV button → Server Action streaming CSV response from Drizzle query; uses streaming Response with Content-Disposition header
RBAC guard: Add Asset button hidden for non-manager roles; check via session in Server Component
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.assets.list.*

label: asset_detail_page
translation_notes: MNT_ASSET_DETAIL mock → Drizzle query joining assets + pm_schedules + history + spares + documents + downtime + calibration_records with tab-specific sub-queries
8-tab navigation (overview/history/pm/cal/spares/docs/downtime/sensors) → shadcn Tabs component; each tab is a separate Server Component fetch boundary via Suspense
Asset nameplate card → read-only dl/dd table in shadcn Card; Ltree path rendered as breadcrumb chips
MTBF/MTTR/Availability gauge rows → inline SVG progress bars; values sourced from oee_shift_metrics cross-module join
Spares BOM tab → shadcn Table with stock-low-row conditional styling (Tailwind bg-red-50); Reorder action inline
Downtime events tab → read-only from production_downtime_events; Link mWO button opens DtLinkModal
Sensors tab (P2) → placeholder with disabled overlay; gated by feature flag iot.sensors.enabled; BL-MAINT-01
LOTO active banner → conditional Alert shown when loto_procedures WHERE asset_id=? AND status=active exists
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.assets.detail.*
known_bugs: BL-MAINT-01: IoT sensors tab is P2 placeholder — no real time-series chart

label: wr_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_WRS mock → Drizzle query on work_requests with status filter pushed to WHERE clause via URL search params
Table/Kanban view toggle → URL param ?view=table|kanban; each view is a separate client component below the shared filter bar
Kanban columns (Submitted/Triaged/Scheduled-Done/Rejected) → drag-and-drop deferred; prototype uses click-to-triage only; use @hello-pangea/dnd for production
Kanban card → shadcn Card with compact layout; onClick opens wrTriage modal or navigates to mwo_detail
Filter bar (status/priority) → nuqs URL search params; filters applied in Drizzle WHERE clause in Server Component
Triage button inline in table → visible only to isManager + status=requested; opens WRTriageModal with wr prop
RBAC guard: Submit Work Request button visible to all roles; Triage button isManager only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.wr.list.*

label: mwo_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_MWOS mock → Drizzle query with tab-aware WHERE clause (mine: tech_id=session.userId, open, in_progress, overdue, completed) via URL search param ?tab=X
Tab counts → aggregate COUNT queries per status group; use Promise.all for parallel fetch in Server Component
Filter bar (type/priority/source) → nuqs URL params; source enum maps to mwos.source_type column (manual/pm_schedule/auto_downtime/oee_trigger/calibration_alert)
DT impact column (mwo.dtImpact) → boolean join against downtime_links; render red chip vs dash
Inline action buttons by status → Start/Complete/Assign/Triage buttons; each calls Server Action or opens relevant modal
Export button → streaming CSV Server Action with full mwos join result
RBAC: New mWO button isManager only; Complete button tech or manager; Triage isManager only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.mwo.list.*

label: mwo_detail_page
translation_notes: State machine strip (requested→approved→open→in_progress→completed) → read-only stepper built from shadcn Steps or custom ol/li with Tailwind; current state derived from mwos.status
7-tab layout (overview/tasks/parts/labor/downtime/signoff/history) → shadcn Tabs with Suspense per tab; each tab fetches its own sub-query
Tasks tab checklist → list of mwo_tasks rows; each item shows complete button calling TaskCheckoffModal; out-of-spec measurement rendered with red FAIL badge
Parts tab (planned + unplanned) → two shadcn Tables from mwo_parts_planned + mwo_parts_unplanned; Consume action triggers partsConsume Server Action updating spare qty
Labor tab time entries → mwo_labor_entries table; Log time button opens LogTime modal; rate calculation shown to isManager only
Downtime link tab → read-only from mwo_downtime_links join with downtime_events; Unlink Server Action for isManager
Sign-off tab → multi-role signoff rows from mwo_signoffs; Sign off button calls Server Action with current user + timestamp + role
History/audit tab → mwo_history event log; reverse-chronological activity feed using shadcn Timeline (custom) or simple ol/li
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.mwo.detail.*

label: pm_schedules_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_PM_SCHEDULES mock → Drizzle query on pm_schedules with overdue/due computed as (next_due_date - now())::int
List/Week/Month view toggle → URL param ?view=list|week|month; PMWeekCalendar and PMMonthCalendar rendered conditionally
6-KPI summary strip → aggregate COUNT/AVG queries; PM compliance % from pm_occurrences completed vs scheduled in last 30 days
Filter bar (type/technician/status/overdueOnly) → nuqs URL params applied to Drizzle WHERE
Row-level conditional styling (row-overdue/row-due) → Tailwind conditional classes based on days computed column
Edit/Skip inline buttons → isManager only via RBAC; open PMEditModal/PMSkipModal with pm prop
Create PM Schedule button → opens PMEditModal in create mode; RBAC guard isManager
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.pm.list.*

label: pm_month_calendar
translation_notes: Hand-rolled calendar grid computation (firstDayOfWeek/cells array) → replace with date-fns or dayjs calendar helpers; monthOffset maps to URL param
eventsMap keyed by yyyy-mm-dd → computed from pm_schedules.next_due_date grouped by date in Server Component
Calendar cells grid (cal-grid-month CSS) → CSS Grid 7 columns with auto-rows; today cell highlighted via Tailwind ring-2
Event chips (cc-event) per day (max 4 + overflow) → colored span with truncate; overdue class adds red styling
Prev/Next month navigation → URL param ?monthOffset incremented/decremented; shallow routing via useRouter().push
Legend chips for PM types → static row of colored Badge components matching cal-event type classes
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.pm.calendar.*

label: pm_week_calendar
translation_notes: Hand-rolled week header (weekDays array) → replace with date-fns eachDayOfInterval for current week; today highlighted
byAsset grouping of schedules → SQL GROUP BY asset_id + date join in Server Component; assets × days grid
Asset × day grid (cal-week CSS) → CSS Grid with asset name column + 7 day columns using grid-template-columns: minmax(120px,auto) repeat(7,1fr)
Prev/Next week navigation → URL param ?weekOffset; shallow routing
Event chips per cell → same cc-event colored span pattern as month calendar; no overflow truncation needed (fewer events per cell)
Max 12 assets visible → pagination or virtual scrolling for large asset counts in production
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.pm.weekCalendar.*

label: spares_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_SPARES mock → Drizzle query on spare_parts with on_hand, min, max columns; low stock computed as on_hand <= min
6-KPI summary strip → aggregate queries: COUNT(*), COUNT(on_hand<=min), COUNT(critical=true), COUNT(DISTINCT cat), AVG(lead_time_days), SUM(on_hand*unit_cost)
Filter bar (category/critOnly/lowOnly) → nuqs URL params; categories derived from DISTINCT cat query
stock-low-row conditional styling → Tailwind bg-red-50 based on s.onHand <= s.min computed in Server Component
WH ref column (CmChip) → cross-module link to warehouse LP; rendered as shadcn Badge with href to /warehouse/lps/[lp]
Reorder/Adjust inline buttons → conditional on low stock; open respective modals; RBAC guard for Adjust (isManager)
Add Part button incorrectly calls assetEdit modal in prototype → production should call separate spare part create form
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.spares.list.*

label: spare_detail_page
translation_notes: MNT_SPARE_DETAIL mock → Drizzle query joining spare_parts + spare_stock_by_location + spare_transactions + linked_assets with all sub-queries
4-KPI stock cards (on-hand/reorder/max/unit-cost) → shadcn Card grid; stock bar uses inline style width % → Tailwind dynamic or CSS variable
Stock by warehouse location table → spare_stock_by_location table with Ltree path display; Adjust action per row opens SpareAdjustModal
Consumption history table → spare_transactions ORDER BY created_at DESC; type badge (consume/receipt/adjustment) as colored Badge
Linked assets table → spare_asset_bom join table; click navigates to asset detail
Master data read-only panel → right column key-value table from spare_parts master; Edit Part calls separate CRUD form
Architecture note: no LP picker/FEFO logic → maintain this boundary; spare parts are qty_on_hand simple tracking only in P1
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.spares.detail.*

label: calibration_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_INSTRUMENTS mock → Drizzle query on calibration_instruments joining calibration_records for last result + next_due_date computed column
6-KPI strip (current/due/overdue/CCP blocks/last FAIL/next scheduled) → aggregate queries; CCP blocks sourced from quality_ccps cross-module join
CCP block banner → alert sourced from calibration_instruments WHERE ccp_block=true; links to 09-QUALITY CCP detail
Filter bar (type/standard/status/ccpOnly) → nuqs URL params; status computed from days_until_due < 0 (overdue) / < 30 (due)
ccp-block-row conditional row styling → Tailwind bg-red-50 based on i.ccpBlock in Server Component
Record button inline → opens CalReadingModal with instrument code; all roles can record calibration (configurable via RBAC settings)
Export for audit button → streaming CSV with all calibration_records for audit period; include SHA-256 hashes for 21 CFR Part 11
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.calibration.list.*

label: calibration_detail_page
translation_notes: MNT_CAL_DETAIL mock → Drizzle query joining calibration_instruments + latest calibration_record + latestPoints + records history + certs
6-stat header row → shadcn Card with grid-cols-6; linked asset navigates to /maintenance/assets/[id]
CCP block alert (alert-red) → conditional from instrument.ccp_block boolean; Record now button is prominent primary action
Latest result banner with dynamic background (green/red/amber) → Tailwind conditional bg-green-50/bg-red-50/bg-amber-50 via cn()
Test points table (latest calibration) → read-only shadcn Table with in-spec tick/cross indicators (tp-check ok/fail classes → Tailwind text-green-600/text-red-600)
History tab → calibration_records table with BRCGS 7-year retention note; mWO link navigates cross-module
Certificate tab → calibration_certificates with SHA-256 display and PDF open; Upload new certificate button opens CertUploadModal
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.calibration.detail.*

label: technicians_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_TECHNICIANS mock → Drizzle query on technicians table joining tech_certifications for cert expiry + mwo count
List/Skills matrix view toggle → URL param ?view=list|matrix; matrix is separate client component
Skills matrix table → technicians × MNT_SKILLS cross-join resolved via MNT_SKILL_MATRIX lookup → Drizzle query on tech_skill_matrix table
Matrix cell levels (specialist/has/none) → shadcn badge or text cell with Tailwind bg-color by level; ⚡/✓/— icons preserved
Cert expiry DueCell → DueCell component with amber/red color based on days_until_expiry < 30
Hourly rate hidden for non-managers → server-side RBAC gate; rate field not included in query for technician role
Edit skills inline button → TechSkillModal; isManager RBAC; PDF export (BL-MAINT-05) is stub
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.technicians.list.*
known_bugs: BL-MAINT-05: Skills Matrix PDF export with cert scans is button stub only

label: technician_detail_page
translation_notes: MNT_TECHNICIANS[0] mock → Drizzle query on technicians WHERE id=? joining tech_certifications + tech_skill_matrix + assigned mwos count
Avatar initials circle → shadcn Avatar with fallback initials; color computed from id hash for uniqueness
Profile/History tabs → shadcn Tabs; history tab queries mwos WHERE tech_id=?
Certifications table → tech_certifications with DueCell for expiry; GDPR note displayed as info Alert
Skills table → tech_skill_matrix values for this technician; derived from join with skill catalog (MNT_SKILLS from settings_ref_tables)
Hourly rate shown to isManager only → server-side RBAC; field excluded from query for non-manager roles per GDPR minimization
Assignment history table → mwos filtered by tech_id; navigate to mwo detail on row click

label: loto_list_page
translation_notes: MNT_LOTO_PROCS mock + MNT_LOTO_DETAIL mock → Drizzle query on loto_procedures joining assets + mwos + energy_sources JSONB + tags JSONB
Active-only toggle → URL param ?activeOnly=true; WHERE status=active in Drizzle query
Active procedures count banner (alert-amber) → real-time via SSE subscription on loto_procedures table changes or 30s polling
LOTO table → shadcn Table; loto-row conditional class → Tailwind bg-amber-50 for active rows
Clear LOTO button → opens LotoClearModal with proc prop; View button navigates to procedure detail
Active LOTO detail expansion card → MNT_LOTO_DETAIL fetched for first active procedure; energy sources list + tags table rendered inline

label: maintenance_analytics_page

Date range selector (7d/30d/90d/12m) + asset filter → URL params; passed as WHERE clause bounds to all sub-queries in Server Component
6-tab analytics layout → shadcn Tabs; each tab is a separate Suspense boundary with its own Server Component data fetch
Inline SVG bar charts (MTBF trend, PM compliance bars) → replace with shadcn Chart (Recharts wrapper) BarChart/LineChart; BL-RPT-02 pattern
Pareto chart → horizontal bar + cumulative % line → Recharts ComposedChart in client component; pareto data from downtime_events grouped by cause
Problem assets gauge rows → shadcn Progress bars with asset name label; dt hours data from mwo_labor aggregated by asset
Technician utilisation table → mwo_labor GROUP BY tech_id with SUM(hours) + AVG/mwo + SUM(cost) computed in SQL
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under maintenance.analytics.*

label: maintenance_settings_page
translation_notes: MNT_SETTINGS mock → Drizzle query on maintenance_settings table (keyed config rows) + criticality_taxonomy + notification_preferences per tenant
Left-nav section list (asset-hier sidebar pattern) → shadcn NavigationMenu or simple button list with active state; section stored in URL param ?section=general
General defaults form → react-hook-form with zod validation; numeric inputs for pmLeadTimeDays/calWarnDays/mtbfTarget etc.; Save calls Server Action
Criticality taxonomy table → useFieldArray; description textareas editable; drag-to-reorder → @hello-pangea/dnd Draggable rows; order persisted to DB
LOTO policy section → Select fields; two-person critical toggle enforced non-nullable; photo evidence has required/recommended/optional enum
OEE trigger section → rendered disabled with P2 Alert; gated by feature flag oeeTrigger.enabled
Notifications table → list of event+frequency+checkbox rows from notification_event_types reference; useFieldArray pattern
